LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER EVANS CONSOLES (KUNSHAN) CO. LTD.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR	711, CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ray Yetka, Esq. (415-357-0600) of Utrecht & Lenvin for Plaintiff.
No other Appearances.

RULING - ARGUED. The Court asks for authority for the proposition. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Evans Consoles (Kunshan) Co. Ltd.'s Petition to confirm arbitration award is denied without prejudice to being refiled. Petitioner fails to provide any authority or reason why an arbitration award issued in China should be confirmed by this court. Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)
